title: Dap ur Homies! Updated
description: This is a 1.21.11 (and 26.1.1) port of Anteryo's Dap ur Homies project.
body:
# DAP ur Homies! 1.21.11 Port - 26.1, 26.1.1, and 26.1.2 Beta out now!

A port of the original DAP ur Homies! mod to Minecraft 1.21.11 and newer versions. It will take a few weeks to update to the most recent version after an update comes out.

## What does this mod do?

This mod adds multiplayer movement mechanics so you and your friends can interact in fun new ways:

- **Dap (G)** — Hold to charge, release near a friend. 5 tiers from a simple fist bump to a world-destroying shockwave.
- **Yeet (R)** — Pick up your friend and launch them. Set them on fire first for explosive results.
- **Boost (Shift + Right Click)** — Send your friend flying upward.
- **Catch (R)** — Save a falling friend at the last second, like a water clutch.
- **Squash (G while falling)** — Land on a friend from 20+ blocks up to flatten them.
- **Mahito Potion** — Craft it and dap a friend for a surprise effect.

All features require at least 2 players. Works on dedicated servers and LAN worlds. All players must have the mod installed. Also make sure the required mods you download are the same version as the Dap ur Homies file.

## Requirements

- Fabric API
- [Player Animation Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-animation-library)

## Support the Original Creator

This mod was originally made by **Anteryo**. If you like the mod, go support them:
- [Subscribe to their YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@anteryo)
- [Donate on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/anteryo)
- [Check out the original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dap-ur-homies)

## Credits

- Original mod by [Anteryo](https://modrinth.com/user/Anteryo)
- Based on [DAP ur Homies!](https://modrinth.com/mod/dap-ur-homies)
- Player Animation Library by ZigyTheBird
- Ported by zaptrem4
